variants.title: Donaldson P782924 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-79948
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P782924 Air Oil Separator is designed to separate oil from compressed air systems, reducing oil carryover and improving air quality. It enhances system efficiency and protects downstream equipment. Built with durable materials, this separator ensures reliable operation in industrial and automotive applications.

variants.title: HiFi Filter OS 101 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-79948
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OS 101 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SAKURA SA-79948. Easy to install and replace, the OS 101 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
